title: SharePoint — Rahmenvertrag 2026
description: Contract document typical for the Office 365 / SharePoint adapter. Contains customer PII (name, email, address, IBAN, tax ID) and justifies vault storage.

title: Outlook — Customer support request

title: GitHub — adapter-template README
